violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment is to apply for a RICFSM with RIDOH. Application was printed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2026
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Paper towels were supplied at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2026

Sausage and eggs were observed held at 50 degrees Fahrenheit in the prep unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per PIC, sausage and eggs were placed in prep unit a half hour prior to inspection. Food was moved to walk-in cooler. Prep unit was observed holding an ambient temperature of 41 DF. Establishment is to monitor the temperature of food in the prep unit. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2026

The presence of small flies is not controlled as evidenced by live activity. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is to continue to work with pest control to eliminate pests. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2026
1 door lowboy #1 gasket was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2026
The grout in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/26/2026

The floor in the service area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The floor/corners in the back kitchen area have an accumulation of soil residue, droppings, and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2026
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2026
No person in charge was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2025

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings throughout establishment. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of: 1. Oven shelving (rodent droppings) 2. Handwash sink compartment (rodent droppings) 3. Window ledge (rodent droppings) 4. Wiring above oven (dust) New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2025

The wall junctures on the window ledge (back area) does not have coving, observed missing pieces with incomplete seal. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2025

The floor in the following areas have an accumulation of rodent droppings. 1. Chemical storage 2. Dry storage 3. Handwash Sink - front area 4. 3 Bay Sink 5. Donut/bagel display The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2025
